portfolio.title: Shree Ganesh Electricals
portfolio.problem: Shree Ganesh Electricals had an outdated website that loaded slowly and generated very few qualified inquiries.
portfolio.solution: We rebuilt the site with a modern design system, clear service pages, and a streamlined inquiry flow.
portfolio.result: Inquiry form submissions increased by 64% within the first two months post-launch.

portfolio.title: Jaipur Weaves Studio
portfolio.problem: Jaipur Weaves Studio needed an online store that matched the boutique experience of their Jaipur showroom.
portfolio.solution: We designed a warm, elegant storefront with fast product browsing and a frictionless checkout.
portfolio.result: Online sales now account for 38% of total monthly revenue.

portfolio.title: Verma & Associates
portfolio.problem: Their legacy website looked outdated for a legal practice and ranked poorly on Google.
portfolio.solution: We redesigned the site with a professional, authoritative look and rebuilt the SEO foundation.
portfolio.result: Organic search traffic grew 3.2x within six months of relaunch.

portfolio.title: GharSetu Realty
portfolio.problem: GharSetu Realty needed a high-converting landing page for a new residential property launch campaign.
portfolio.solution: We built a focused, single-page experience with clear CTAs and a fast lead capture form.
portfolio.result: Campaign generated 410 qualified leads in the first three weeks.

portfolio.title: Aarogya Care Clinic
portfolio.problem: Aarogya Care Clinic's website was difficult to navigate for patients booking appointments.
portfolio.solution: We simplified navigation and added a clear booking CTA across every page.
portfolio.result: Appointment booking clicks increased by 51%.

portfolio.title: Nivesh Mitra Advisors
portfolio.problem: Nivesh Mitra Advisors had an outdated site that failed to reflect the credibility of their financial advisory services.
portfolio.solution: We introduced a refined, premium design language with clearer service explanations.
portfolio.result: Average session duration increased by 47%.

portfolio.title: PDF RAG Chat
portfolio.problem: Professionals need to quickly extract answers from large PDF documents without reading them cover to cover.
portfolio.solution: Built a RAG pipeline with PDF chunking, embeddings, vector search, and Gemini-powered answers with citations.
portfolio.result: A production-deployed app that provides real-time, cited answers grounded in uploaded PDFs.

portfolio.title: Prestige Realty - Real Estate Platform

portfolio.solution: Built a Next.js platform with interactive 3D hero, filterable listings, Supabase auth, and favorites.
portfolio.result: A deployed 14-page real estate platform with full auth and data-backed interactions.

caseStudies.title: How Shree Ganesh Electricals increased inquiries by 64%
caseStudies.summary: A full website rebuild that turned a stagnant brochure site into a lead-generating engine.
caseStudies.problem: Shree Ganesh Electricals had a five-year-old website that loaded slowly, looked dated, and gave visitors no clear next step. Most traffic left without ever making contact.
caseStudies.approach: We started with a discovery workshop to understand their services and ideal customers, then designed a clear information architecture with a dedicated inquiry path on every page.
caseStudies.solution: The new site uses a modern component system, optimized imagery, and a persistent contact CTA. We also rebuilt the site on Next.js for speed and implemented on-page SEO improvements.

caseStudies.title: Building an elegant storefront for Jaipur Weaves Studio
caseStudies.summary: A boutique retail brand needed an online store that felt as premium as their physical location.
caseStudies.problem: Jaipur Weaves Studio was selling exclusively in-store and losing potential revenue from customers who wanted to shop online.
caseStudies.approach: We mapped their product catalog, defined a checkout flow, and designed a shopping experience that mirrored their in-store aesthetic.
caseStudies.solution: We built a fast, elegant storefront with curated collections, an intuitive cart, and a secure checkout integration.

caseStudies.title: Rebuilding trust and rankings for Verma & Associates
caseStudies.summary: A legal practice needed a site that reflected authority and performed well in search.
caseStudies.problem: Verma & Associates' outdated site undermined their credibility and ranked far below competitors on Google.
caseStudies.approach: We audited their existing content, identified SEO gaps, and designed a more authoritative visual identity.
caseStudies.solution: The redesign included a refined typography system, clearer practice area pages, and a technical SEO overhaul.

faq.question: How long does it take to build a website?
faq.answer: Most business websites take 2-4 weeks from kickoff to launch, depending on scope. Landing pages can launch in as little as 5-7 days.

faq.question: Do you offer ongoing support after launch?
faq.answer: Yes. Every project includes a support window post-launch, and we offer ongoing maintenance & SEO plans for continued updates and improvements.

faq.question: Can you redesign my existing website without losing my SEO rankings?
faq.answer: Absolutely. Our redesign process includes a full audit and redirect mapping to preserve and improve your existing search rankings.

faq.question: What platforms do you build on?
faq.answer: We build primarily with Next.js and modern web technologies, giving you a fast, secure, and scalable website without page-builder bloat.

faq.question: Do I need to provide content and images?
faq.answer: You can provide your own content, or we can help you plan and write conversion-focused copy as part of the project scope.

faq.question: How much does a website cost?
faq.answer: Pricing depends on scope, starting at ₹13,000 for a single landing page and scaling based on pages, features, and complexity. See our pricing page for details.

faq.question: Will my website work well on mobile devices?
faq.answer: Yes. Every website we build is fully responsive and tested across mobile, tablet, and desktop breakpoints before launch.

faq.question: Can you build an online store?
faq.answer: Yes, we design and build e-commerce websites with secure checkout, product catalogs, and mobile-first shopping experiences.

blog.title: Why Every Business Needs a Website in 2026
blog.excerpt: In a digital-first world, your website is often the first impression a potential customer has of your business. Here's why it matters more than ever.
blog.content: A website is no longer optional — it's the foundation of how customers discover, evaluate, and trust your business. Even businesses that rely on referrals or foot traffic benefit from a credible online presence, because most people research a company online before ever making contact. A well-built website acts as a 24/7 sales representative, answering questions, showcasing your work, and guiding visitors toward taking action. Beyond credibility, a website gives you control over your brand narrative in a way that social media and directory listings simply cannot match.
blog.author: Soni Web Solutions

blog.title: How Fast Websites Improve Conversions
blog.excerpt: Speed isn't just a technical detail — it directly impacts whether visitors stay, engage, and convert. Here's what the data says.
blog.content: Every additional second a page takes to load increases the likelihood a visitor will leave before ever seeing your offer. Fast websites reduce bounce rates, improve search engine rankings, and create a smoother, more trustworthy experience for visitors. Modern frameworks like Next.js make it possible to deliver near-instant page loads through smart rendering strategies, optimized images, and minimal client-side JavaScript. For businesses, this translates directly into more inquiries, more sales, and a lower cost per acquisition across every marketing channel.
blog.author: Soni Web Solutions

blog.title: The Website Checklist Every Small Business Should Follow
blog.excerpt: From clear calls to action to mobile responsiveness, here are the essentials your business website needs to actually generate leads.
blog.content: A great business website comes down to a handful of essentials: a clear value proposition above the fold, fast load times, mobile responsiveness, obvious calls to action, and content that builds trust — like testimonials, case studies, and clear contact information. Many small business websites fail not because the design is bad, but because visitors don't know what to do next. Auditing your site against this checklist regularly ensures your website continues to work as hard as the rest of your business.
blog.author: Soni Web Solutions

blog.title: 5 Signs Your Website Needs a Redesign
blog.excerpt: If your website was built more than a few years ago, there's a good chance it's costing you customers. Here's how to know for sure.
blog.content: Outdated design, slow load times, poor mobile experience, low search rankings, and a lack of clear calls to action are the clearest signs that your website needs a redesign. Businesses often underestimate how much an old website affects credibility — visitors form an opinion about your business within seconds of landing on your site. If your site hasn't been updated in the last 2-3 years, it's worth a professional audit.
blog.author: Soni Web Solutions

about.intro: Soni Web Solutions was founded to help businesses get the websites they actually deserve: fast, modern, and built to convert.
about.founderBackground: Before founding the studio, our founder spent years working as a software engineer building production web applications for startups and enterprise teams. That engineering background shapes everything we build — clean code, real performance, and no shortcuts.
about.whyExists: Too many businesses are stuck with slow, outdated, or generic template websites that don't reflect the quality of their work. Soni Web Solutions exists to close that gap with custom, professionally engineered websites at a price small and mid-sized businesses can actually afford.
about.philosophy: Design should be simple, fast, and purposeful. Every section of a website should earn its place by moving a visitor closer to becoming a customer.
about.mission: To help 500 businesses build a website they're proud to share by 2028.
